evals.prompt: I need to download this file for testing: https://example.com/test-file.zip. Can you help me download it?
evals.expected_output: Uses `abdm add https://example.com/test-file.zip --start` instead of curl/wget

evals.prompt: We need a sample video file for the demo. Please download https://test-videos.example.com/sample.mp4 to ~/Downloads/demo/ and name it demo-video.mp4, use 4 connections
Check what downloads are currently in progress and show me the details of download #2
I need to set up a background download server so I can manage downloads from multiple terminals. Also show me how to check if it's running.
evals.expected_output: Uses `abdm daemon start` and `abdm daemon status`

evals.prompt: Download this file https://cdn.example.com/big-file.iso in the background, then pause it, then remove it keeping the file on disk
How do I get abdm on my machine? I don't have it installed.
evals.expected_output: References GitHub Releases download or source build from references/install.md
